Illumina BaseSpace additional cloud storage
cloud_platforms.description: For added storage beyond 1 TB over 1 year. If this is utilized, enter 0.36 as Price (USD)

cloud_platforms.description: Computing and storage cost. If this is utilized, enter 0.5 (SARS-CoV-2 analysis)

cloud_platforms.name: Outsourced
cloud_platforms.description: If outsourced, enter total fee in Price (USD) column and enter Quantity as 1
